prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical illustration of a young woman enjoying a summer night at an open-air café terrace, themed around a “night sky soda” outfit. The character is shown from behind in a three-quarter seated pose, looking toward a deep blue starry sky and a distant city skyline across the water. She has long wavy dark navy hair tied in a high ponytail with a large pale blue bow decorated with tiny gold stars. Her face is mostly turned away and softly obscured, keeping the focus on the outfit and atmosphere. She wears an off-shoulder pale blue frilled blouse with delicate gold constellation embroidery, a loose dark navy cardigan slipped off her shoulders with shooting-star and star motifs on the back, and a layered pleated skirt in navy and light blue with scattered star embroidery. Add a matching frilled drawstring shoulder bag hanging from the chair, decorated with gold chains and exactly 5 visible charms: one miniature blue cream-soda glass charm, one gold star charm, one blue teardrop jewel, one round blue jewel, and one small white pearl-like charm. On the café table at left, place exactly 1 tall blue cream soda in a glass goblet with a straw, sparkling gradient blue liquid, ice cream scoop, whipped cream, and a red cherry, plus exactly 1 small candle lantern nearby. The background should include exactly 2 warm hanging lanterns on the right, leafy plants framing the terrace, a railing, blurred city lights, and a sky filled with many stars plus exactly 2 visible shooting stars. Use rich cinematic lighting, warm lantern highlights against cool moonlit blues, glossy reflections on the table and glass, intricate fabric detail, sparkling star accents, high-detail anime rendering, romantic summer-night mood, vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark. Optional customization: make the main subject anonymous night-sky girl, use dark navy, set the outfit theme to night sky soda, set the drink to blue cream soda, and set the setting to open-air café terrace overlooking a city at night.
